Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ClassInfo

Packages that use ClassInfo
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons
 
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.utils
Common internal utilities.
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
HTTP Part Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Method exec stats utilities

  • Uses of ClassInfo in org.apache.juneau.commons

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons with parameters of type ClassInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT.on(ClassInfo... value)
    Appends the classes that this annotation applies to.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT.onClass(ClassInfo... value)
    Appends the classes that this annotation applies to.

  • Uses of ClassInfo in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

    Subclasses of ClassInfo in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BeanInfo<T>
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-classification surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalents, BeanPropertyMeta-equivalents, etc.) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side ClassMeta.
    Fields in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean with type parameters of type ClassInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    Description
    ClassInfo
    BeanMeta.getClassInfo()
    Returns the ClassInfo of this bean.

    Description
    List<ClassInfo>
    BeanFilter.getBeanDictionary()
     
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean with parameters of type ClassInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanRegistryLookup
    BeanMetaInitializer.buildBeanRegistry(Object marshallingContext, BeanFilter beanFilter, ClassInfo classInfo, BeanConfigContext config)
    Builds the bean-level BeanRegistryLookup for the supplied class.
    static <T> BeanMeta.BeanMetaValue<T>
    BeanMeta.create(BeanInfo<T> cm, ClassInfo implClass)
    Creates a BeanMeta instance for the specified bean type info.
    String
    BeanMetaInitializer.findMarshalledTypeName(BeanConfigContext config, ClassInfo classInfo)
    Returns the marshalling-side @Marshalled(typeName) value for the bean, or null if not set.
    String
    BeanMetaInitializer.findTypeNameInParents(Object marshallingContext, ClassInfo classInfo, Class<?> rawClass)
    Walks the parent classes/interfaces of classInfo and returns the first dictionary-name mapping for rawClass found in any parent's registry, or null if none.
    boolean
    BeanMetaInitializer.hasBeanRegistrationAnnotation(BeanConfigContext config, ClassInfo classInfo)
    Returns true if the supplied class has a "registered as bean" annotation (e.g.
    boolean
    BeanConfigContext.isNotABean(ClassInfo ci)
    Returns true if the specified class is excluded from bean detection.
    BeanInfo<?>
    BeanTypeResolver.resolveType(AnnotationInfo<BeanProp> lastBeanProp, ClassInfo type, TypeVariables typeVarImpls)
    Resolves the bean-property type-info for a property given its (optional) @BeanProp annotation and Java type.
    String
    BeanMetaInitializer.resolveTypePropertyName(BeanConfigContext config, ClassInfo classInfo)
    Returns the marshalling-side @Marshalled(typePropertyName) value for the bean, or null if not set.
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean with type arguments of type ClassInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanRegistryLookup
    BeanMetaInitializer.buildPropertyBeanRegistry(Object marshallingContext, BeanRegistryLookup parent, List<ClassInfo> dictionaryClasses)
    Builds the per-property BeanRegistryLookup chained on top of the bean-level registry.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.notABeanPredicate(Predicate<ClassInfo> value)
    Installs a custom predicate that fully overrides BeanConfigContext.isNotABean(ClassInfo).

    Description

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject that return ClassInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected ClassInfo
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.getBeanSubType()
    Returns the bean subtype class info if specified, or the normal bean type if not.
    protected ClassInfo
    BeanInstantiator.getBeanSubType()
    Returns the bean subtype class info if specified, or the normal bean type if not.
    protected ClassInfo
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.getBuilderType()
    Returns the builder type class info determined by BeanInstantiator.Builder.findBuilderType().
    protected ClassInfo
    BeanInstantiator.getBuilderType()
    Returns the builder type class info determined by builder type detection.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject that return types with arguments of type ClassInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected List<ClassInfo>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.getBeanSubTypes()
    Returns the list of bean subtype classes, including the bean subtype, bean type, and all classes in between.
    protected List<ClassInfo>
    BeanInstantiator.getBeanSubTypes()
    Returns the list of bean subtype classes, including the bean subtype, bean type, and all classes in between.
    protected List<ClassInfo>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.getBuilderTypes()
    Returns the list of builder types, including the primary builder type and any builder types found in the builder's parent hierarchy.
    protected List<ClassInfo>
    BeanInstantiator.getBuilderTypes()
    Returns the list of builder types, including the primary builder type and any builder types found in the builder's parent hierarchy.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.type(ClassInfo value)
    Specifies a subclass of the bean type to create, via a ClassInfo reference.

    ExecutableInfo.declaringClass
     
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect that return ClassInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.arrayType()
    Returns a ClassInfo for an array type whose component type is this class.
    <U> ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.asSubclass(Class<U> clazz)
    Casts this ClassInfo object to represent a subclass of the class represented by the specified class object.
    ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.componentType()
    Returns the component type of this class if it is an array type.
    ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.getComponentType()
    Returns the base component type of this class.
    ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.getDeclaringClass()
    Returns the Class object representing the class or interface that declares the member class represented by this class.
    final ClassInfo
    ExecutableInfo.getDeclaringClass()
    Returns metadata about the class that declared this method or constructor.
    ClassInfo
    FieldInfo.getDeclaringClass()
    Returns metadata about the declaring class.
    ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.getEnclosingClass()
    Returns the immediately enclosing class of this class.
    ClassInfo
    FieldInfo.getFieldType()
    Returns the type of this field.
    ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.getNestHost()
    Returns the nest host of this class.
    ClassInfo
    ParameterInfo.getParameterType()
    Returns the class type of this parameter.
    ClassInfo
    MethodInfo.getReturnType()
    Returns the generic return type of this method as a ClassInfo object.
    ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.getSuperclass()
    Returns the parent class.
    ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.getWrapperIfPrimitive()
    Returns the wrapper class if this is a primitive, otherwise returns this class.
    static final ClassInfo
    ReflectionUtils.info(Object o)
    Returns the ClassInfo wrapper for the class of the specified object.
    static ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.of(Class<?> inner, Type innerType)
    Returns a class info wrapper around the specified class type.
    static ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.of(Object object)
    Same as using the constructor, but operates on an object instance.
    static ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.of(Type innerType)
    Returns a class info wrapper around the specified class type.
    static ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.ofProxy(Object object)
    Same as of(Object) but attempts to deproxify the object if it's wrapped in a CGLIB proxy.
    ClassInfo
    ClassInfo.unwrap(Class<?>... wrapperTypes)
    Unwrap this class if it's a parameterized type of the specified type such as Value or Optional.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect that return types with arguments of type ClassInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ClassInfo>
    ClassInfo.getAllParents()
    Returns a list including this class and all parent classes and interfaces.
    List<ClassInfo>
    ClassInfo.getDeclaredInterfaces()
    Returns a list of interfaces declared on this class.
    List<ClassInfo>
    ClassInfo.getDeclaredMemberClasses()
    Returns all classes and interfaces declared as members of this class.
    final List<ClassInfo>
    ExecutableInfo.getExceptionTypes()
    Returns the exception types on this executable.
    List<ClassInfo>
    ClassInfo.getInterfaces()
    Returns a list of interfaces defined on this class and superclasses.
    List<ClassInfo>
    ClassInfo.getMemberClasses()
    Returns all public member classes and interfaces declared by this class and its superclasses.
    List<ClassInfo>
    ClassInfo.getNestMembers()
    Returns an array containing all the classes and interfaces that are members of the nest to which this class belongs.
    final List<ClassInfo>
    ExecutableInfo.getParameterTypes()
    Returns the parameter types for this executable.
    List<ClassInfo>
    ClassInfo.getParents()
    Returns a list including this class and all parent classes.
    List<ClassInfo>
    ClassInfo.getParentsAndInterfaces()
    Returns all parent classes and interfaces in proper traversal order.
    List<ClassInfo>
    ClassInfo.getPermittedSubclasses()
    Returns the permitted subclasses of this sealed class.
    Optional<ClassInfo>
    AnnotationInfo.getReturnType(String methodName)
    Returns the return type of the specified method on this annotation.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect with parameters of type ClassInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    ClassInfo.compareTo(ClassInfo o)
     
    <A extends Annotation>
    List<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(Class<A> type, ClassInfo c, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds annotations from a class using configurable traversal options.
    List<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(ClassInfo c, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds all annotations from a class using configurable traversal options, without filtering by annotation type.
    <A extends Annotation>
    boolean
    AnnotationProvider.has(Class<A> type, ClassInfo c, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Checks if a class has the specified annotation.
    final boolean
    ExecutableInfo.hasParameterType(ClassInfo type)
    Returns true if this executable has a parameter of the specified type in any position.
    final boolean
    ExecutableInfo.hasParameterTypeParent(ClassInfo type)
    Returns true if this executable has a parameter that is a parent of the specified type in any position.
    final boolean
    ExecutableInfo.hasParameterTypeParents(ClassInfo... args)
    Returns true if this method has the specified argument parent classes.
    final boolean
    ExecutableInfo.hasParameterTypes(ClassInfo... args)
    Returns true if this method has the specified arguments.
    final boolean
    ExecutableInfo.hasParameterTypesLenient(ClassInfo... args)
    Returns true if this method has at most only these arguments using lenient matching.
    boolean
    MethodInfo.hasReturnType(ClassInfo ci)
    Returns true if this method has this return type.
    boolean
    MethodInfo.hasReturnTypeParent(ClassInfo ci)
    Returns true if this method has this parent return type.
    boolean
    ClassInfo.is(ClassInfo c)
    Checks for equality with the specified class.
    boolean
    ClassInfo.isAssignableFrom(ClassInfo child)
    Returns true if this class is a parent or the same as child.
    boolean
    ClassInfo.isAssignableTo(ClassInfo parent)
    Returns true if this class is a child or the same as parent.
    boolean
    ClassInfo.isChildOf(ClassInfo parent)
    Returns true if this class is strictly a child of parent (not the same class).
    final boolean
    ExecutableInfo.isDeclaringClass(ClassInfo value)
    Returns true if the declaring class of this executable matches the specified class.
    boolean
    ClassInfo.isParentOf(ClassInfo child)
    Returns true if this class is strictly a parent of child (not the same class).
    boolean
    ClassInfo.isParentOfLenient(ClassInfo child)
    Same as isParentOfLenient(Class) but takes in a ClassInfo.
    static ConstructorInfo
    ConstructorInfo.of(ClassInfo declaringClass, Constructor<?> inner)
    Creates a ConstructorInfo wrapper for the specified constructor.
    static FieldInfo
    FieldInfo.of(ClassInfo declaringClass, Field inner)
    Creates a FieldInfo wrapper for the specified field.
    static MethodInfo
    MethodInfo.of(ClassInfo declaringClass, Method inner)
    Creates a MethodInfo wrapper for the specified method.
    static PackageInfo
    PackageInfo.of(ClassInfo childClass)
    Returns a package info wrapper around the package of the specified class info.
    final int
    ExecutableInfo.parameterMatchesLenientCount(ClassInfo... argTypes)
    Returns how well this method matches the specified arg types using lenient matching.

    Returns the T class, the normalized form of the class.

    Returns the G class, the generalized form of the class.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Look for constructors and methods on this class and construct a dynamic swap if it's possible to do so.

    Look for constructors and methods on this class and construct a dynamic swap if it's possible to do so.

    Inspects the specified class and returns a swap of this type if possible.
